description.value:
Your nature is to tackle your problems immediately and directly, even if it means leaving scorched earth in your wake.

You become trained in Intimidation. If you would automatically become trained in Intimidation (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Quick Coercion] skill feat. Additionally, once per day, you can temporarily attune your soulfeel to fury for 1 minute as a free action that has the concentrate trait.
